bioText:
I am from Malaysia, and moved to the US for my college education. I graduated from Northeastern University with a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Game Development.

I speak English natively, Mandarin fluently, and Malay conversationally.

I enjoy developing tools, as evident in my ventures in game engine development and programming languages. However, it is equally as important to me that I actually ship things. Computer science is my wife, and game development is my mistress. Portal 2 and The Witness are my two all-time favourite video games.

Outside of programming, I enjoy cycling.
